Concept: Slag

Creator

Description


Usage List:

  • Appears as Slag in Diagram Recycle in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Slag in Diagram Pyrometallurgy in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Slag in Diagram Hydrometallurgy in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
